json_data.title: Networking Fundamentals
json_data.reason: This topic expands on how computers communicate, building upon the concepts of the Network Manager and Cloud Computing introduced in the current material.

json_data.title: Computer Architecture and Organization
json_data.reason: This topic delves into the underlying hardware components and design principles, providing a deeper understanding of how the computer system executes instructions and manages data, complementing the OS's role.

json_data.title: Distributed Systems
json_data.reason: This topic explores the advanced challenges and solutions for building reliable and scalable systems across multiple networked computers, directly extending from the foundational ideas of Cloud Computing and network management.
